module_title: Module 3: Protecting your Data and Privacy

questions.text: Which tool is primarily designed to monitor and control incoming and outgoing network traffic based on predetermined security rules?
options: Antivirus Software
Firewall
Web Browser
Router

questions.text: What is the most critical practice for ensuring data recovery in the event of a ransomware attack?
options: Changing your password weekly
Installing a second operating system
Maintaining regular, offline data backups
Defragmenting your hard drive

questions.text: When you use a 'free' social media platform or search engine, how is your personal data typically handled by the provider?
options: It is completely ignored and deleted immediately
It is locked in an encrypted vault only accessible by you
It is often collected, analyzed, and used to generate revenue through targeted advertising
It is sent directly to government agencies for storage
questions.answer: It is often collected, analyzed, and used to generate revenue through targeted advertising

questions.text: Which of the following is one of the most effective ways to secure an online account beyond just using a strong password?
options: Using the same password for every account so you don't forget it
Enabling Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) or Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
Only logging in during daylight hours
Clearing your browser cache daily
questions.answer: Enabling Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) or Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)

chapters.chapter_name: Discover Your Own Risky Online Behavior

questions.text: Which of the following actions is considered a highly risky online behavior?
options: Using a password manager to generate unique passwords
Clicking on unverified links in unexpected text messages or emails
Keeping your operating system and applications updated
Using a VPN when connected to public Wi-Fi
questions.answer: Clicking on unverified links in unexpected text messages or emails
